---
title: "P00 | Minimal PDF Report"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(ggplot2)

df <- data.frame(group = c("A", "B"), value = c(2, 5))
```

# Goal

This is a minimal example PDF report for `rmdreportdeck`.

## Figure

```{r}
ggplot(df, aes(group, value, fill = group)) + geom_col()
```
